name: Sales Operations Managers at Salesforce using commission reports tool
description: For Sales Operations Managers at Salesforce processing 10–20 commission reports/week, manual reconciliation causes delayed insights. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of commission reports with CRM data.

problem_solved: Inaccurate sales commission reporting due to manual reconciliation processes.
features: Manual data entry for commission reports
